hero.title: Marília Gomes
hero.bio: Customer Success professional with experience in B2B and B2C, specialized in retention, revenue expansion, and strategic relationship management.

about.title: About
about.bio_1: Customer Success professional with experience in B2B and B2C companies, specialized in retention, revenue expansion, and strategic relationship management. I've worked at Vista Software and Loft managing strategic accounts, conducting trainings, workshops, and key metric analysis including NPS, CSAT, Health Score, churn risk, and MRR.
about.bio_2: Strong background in operational efficiency, consultative support, and multichannel experience management. I look for challenges that connect strategy, technology, and customer experience to deliver consistent results.

experience.description: End-to-end ticket management ensuring SLAs and customer satisfaction. Strategic prioritization in high-volume, multichannel environments. Use of ERP, Zendesk, and Shopify for operational analysis and workflow optimization. Handling critical cases with focus on negotiation and risk mitigation.

Led B2C sales cycles with consultative customer support. Managed retailer relationships, strengthening partnerships and commercial expansion. Monitored sell-out goals and indicators to support sales performance.

Managed strategic accounts in the real estate sector focused on satisfaction and retention. Conducted trainings and workshops to drive platform adoption. Analyzed performance metrics — NPS, CSAT, Health Score, churn risk, and MRR — to guide retention and expansion strategies.

Managed client portfolio driving engagement and platform adoption. Executed retention and expansion strategies through upsell and cross-sell. Implemented personalized success plans, tracked KPIs, and conducted online and in-person trainings.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Cases, initiatives, and deliveries that generated real impact.
